title: NANA joins Arctic Economic Council
summary: Alaska voices crucial to ongoing economic development in the Arctic NANA Regional Corporation joined the Arctic Economic Council (AEC) as an Arctic Partner, reemphasizing NANA’s role in responsible and culturally sensitive Arctic business development. title: Voice Your Opinion on Arctic Refuge Drilling
summary: Photo: Alaskan Express As of April 20 th , the Trump administration has launched the process to lease the coastal plain of the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge for oil drilling.
